figures.name: Natural Twist Turn with Closed Impetus And Feather Finish Ending
figures.preceding_figure_names: Closed Telemark, Hover Telemark, Three Step
figures.following_figure_names: Three Step, Reverse Turn (just Reverse Turn with Feather finish, or 1-4 Reverse Turn check and Basic Weave), Change Of Direction, Closed Telemark, Open Telemark and Feather Ending, Open Telemark, Natural Turn, Outside Swivel and Feather Ending, Hover Telemark, Reverse Wave, Top Spin (check back after step 3 of feather finish), Outside Swivel (check back after step 3 of Feather Step), Fallaway Reverse and Slip Pivot, Bounce Fallaway with Weave Ending, Natural Weave (after step 5, continue with 3-8 of Natural Weave), Closed Impetus and Feather Finish (after step 5, continue with 3-7 Closed Impetus and Feather Finish), Open Impetus ( ater step 5, continue with 3-4 of Open Impetus)
figures.notes:
Note:
Lady needs to monitor where Man's body is, where his center is.
She needs own individual balance.
Dissolve sway, use range of motion, taking head, spine to LF, Swing, turn feet underneath body.
Keep shoulders quiet. Arms belong to partner at all times (especially when going backward.)

steps.action: LF to side and slightly back | Backing DC against LOD

figures.name: Natural Twist Turn with Open Impetus Ending
figures.preceding_figure_names: Closed Telemark, Hover Telemark, Three Step
figures.following_figure_names: Three Step, Reverse Turn (just Reverse Turn with Feather finish, or 1-4 Reverse Turn check and Basic Weave), Change Of Direction, Closed Telemark, Open Telemark and Feather Ending, Open Telemark, Natural Turn, Outside Swivel and Feather Ending, Hover Telemark, Reverse Wave, Top Spin (check back after step 3 of feather finish), Outside Swivel (check back after step 3 of Feather Step), Fallaway Reverse and Slip Pivot, Bounce Fallaway with Weave Ending, Natural Weave (after step 5, continue with 3-8 of Natural Weave), Closed Impetus and Feather Finish (after step 5, continue with 3-7 Closed Impetus and Feather Finish), Open Impetus ( ater step 5, continue with 3-4 of Open Impetus)
figures.notes:
Note:
Leader description includes step: LF diag fwd in PP L side leading | Pointing DC. body facing LOD | TH
Follower description includes step: RF to side in PP | Pointing to center, moving DC | TH
This is the Open Impetus.
SQQS: RF fwd in PP and CBMP | Pointing DC. body facing LOD
Feather finish.

steps.action: LF diag fwd in PP L side leading | Pointing DC. body facing LOD
